title: AIREP profile: observability_transport v0.1
description: Binds an AIREP record to an observability span so a signed governance record and the telemetry of the same decision can be correlated. INDICATIVE: the OpenTelemetry / OpenInference attribute conventions are a design aid to be checked against those specs. This profile records WHICH transport carried the record and the span it rode on; the actual SDK glue (emitting the record as a span attribute) is adoption work, not part of the core. Attaches under profiles.observability_transport; never changes the core; carries no personal data.

transport.description: The telemetry transport the record was carried over.

trace_id.description: The transport trace id (for OpenTelemetry, 32 lowercase hex characters) linking this record to a distributed trace.

span_id.description: The transport span id (for OpenTelemetry, 16 lowercase hex characters) of the decision's span.

record_carrier.description: How the AIREP record travels on the span.

attribute_key.description: The span attribute key under which the record (or its hash) is set, for example 'airep.record' or 'airep.current'.

carries.description: Whether the span attribute holds the full canonical record or only its integrity.current hash (a pointer to the out-of-band record).

openinference.description: OpenInference-specific fields, when transport is openinference.
